requirements.raw_text: Formula: Enchant Weapon - Agility Phase 1 Item Level 58 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (290) Requires Timbermaw Hold - Honored Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant a weapon to increase your agility by 15. Permanently enchant a melee weapon to grant +15 Agility. Sell Price: 75 This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is sold by Meilosh. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item from Classic World of Warcraft.

Formula: Enchant Weapon - Agility Phase 1 Item Level 58 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (290) Requires Timbermaw Hold - Honored Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant a weapon to increase your agility by 15. Permanently enchant a melee weapon to grant +15 Agility. Sell Price: 75 This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is sold by Meilosh. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item from Classic World of Warcraft.

Formula: Enchant Gloves - Threat Phase 1 Item Level 70 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (300) Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant gloves to increase the threat that the wearer generates against monsters. Permanently enchant gloves to increase threat from all attacks and spells by 2%. Sell Price: 2 50 This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is looted from Emperor Vek'nilash. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item.

Formula: Enchant Gloves - Superior Agility Phase 1 Item Level 70 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (300) Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant gloves to increase Agility by 15. Permanently enchant gloves to increase agility by 15. Sell Price: 2 50 This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is looted from The Prophet Skeram. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item.

Formula: Enchant Cloak - Subtlety Phase 1 Item Level 70 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (300) Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant a cloak to reduce how threatening the wearer is to monsters by 2%. Permanently enchant a cloak to decrease threat caused by the wearer by 2%. Sell Price: 2 50 This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is looted from Emperor Vek'lor. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item.

Formula: Enchant Cloak - Dodge Phase 1 Item Level 70 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (300) Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant a cloak to give 12 dodge rating. Permanently enchant a cloak to give 12 dodge rating. Sell Price: 2 50 This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is looted from The Prophet Skeram. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item.

Formula: Enchant Bracer - Superior Healing Phase 1 Item Level 65 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (325) Requires Honor Hold - Friendly Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant a bracer to increase the effect of healing spells by up to 30 and damage spells by up to 10. Permanently enchants bracers to increase the effect of your healing spells by up to 30 and your damage spells by up to 10. Requires a level 35 or higher item. Sell Price: 1 50 This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is sold by Logistics Officer Ulrike. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item.

Formula: Enchant Bracer - Superior Healing Phase 1 Item Level 65 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (325) Requires Honor Hold - Friendly Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant a bracer to increase the effect of healing spells by up to 30 and damage spells by up to 10. Permanently enchants bracers to increase the effect of your healing spells by up to 30 and your damage spells by up to 10. Requires a level 35 or higher item. Sell Price: 1 50 This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is sold by Logistics Officer Ulrike. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item.

Formula: Enchant Bracer - Fortitude Phase 1 Item Level 70 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (350) Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant a bracer to increase Stamina by 12. Permanently enchants bracers to give 12 Stamina. Requires a level 35 or higher item. Sell Price: 1 50 This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is looted from Coilfang Oracle. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item.

Formula: Enchant Bracer - Spellpower Phase 1 Item Level 72 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (360) Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant a bracer to increase spell damage and healing by up to 15. Permanently enchant bracers to increase spell damage and healing by up to 15. Requires a level 35 or higher item. Sell Price: 2 This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is looted from Bloodmaul Geomancer. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item.

Formula: Enchant Ring - Spellpower Phase 1 Item Level 72 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (360) Requires Keepers of Time - Honored Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant a ring to increase spell damage and healing by up to 12. Permanently enchant a ring to increase spell damage and healing by up to 12. Only the Enchanter's rings can be enchanted, and enchanting a ring will cause it to become soulbound. Sell Price: 2 50 This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is sold by Alurmi. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item from World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade.

Formula: Enchant Ring - Spellpower Phase 1 Item Level 72 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (360) Requires Keepers of Time - Honored Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant a ring to increase spell damage and healing by up to 12. Permanently enchant a ring to increase spell damage and healing by up to 12. Only the Enchanter's rings can be enchanted, and enchanting a ring will cause it to become soulbound. Sell Price: 2 50 This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is sold by Alurmi. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item from World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade.

Formula: Enchant Ring - Healing Power Phase 1 Item Level 74 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (370) Requires The Sha'tar - Revered Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant a ring to increase healing spell effects by up to 20 and damage spell effects by up to 7. Permanently enchant a ring to increase healing spells by up to 20 and damage spells by up to 7. Only the enchanter's rings can be enchanted, and enchanting a ring will cause it to become soulbound. Requires a level 35 or higher item. Sell Price: 2 50 This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is sold by Almaador. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item from World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade.

Formula: Enchant Ring - Healing Power Phase 1 Item Level 74 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (370) Requires The Sha'tar - Revered Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant a ring to increase healing spell effects by up to 20 and damage spell effects by up to 7. An item from World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade.

Formula: Enchant Ring - Stats Phase 1 Item Level 75 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (375) Requires Lower City - Honored Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant a ring to increase all stats by 4. Permanently enchant a ring to increase all stats by 4. Only the enchanter's rings can be enchanted, and enchanting a ring will cause it to become soulbound. Requires a level 35 or higher item. Sell Price: 5 This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is sold by Nakodu. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item from World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade.

Formula: Enchant Ring - Stats Phase 1 Item Level 75 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (375) Requires Lower City - Honored Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant a ring to increase all stats by 4. Sell Price: 5 This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is sold by Nakodu. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item from World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade.

Formula: Enchant Shield - Intellect Phase 1 Item Level 65 Requires Enchanting (325) Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant a shield to increase Intellect by 12. Permanently enchant a shield to give 12 intellect. Requires a level 35 or higher item. Sell Price: 1 50 This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is sold by Aged Dalaran Wizard. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item.

Formula: Enchant Boots - Fortitude Phase 1 Item Level 64 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (320) Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant boots to grant 12 Stamina. Permanently enchant boots to increase Stamina by 12. Requires a level 35 or higher item. Sell Price: 1 50 This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is looted from Ethereal Priest. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item.

Formula: Enchant Boots - Dexterity Phase 1 Item Level 68 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (340) Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant boots to grant 12 Agility. Permanently enchant boots to increase Agility by 12. Requires a level 35 or higher item. Sell Price: 1 50 Formula: Enchant Boots - Dexterity is the Enchanting formula for . It has a low chance to drop from Raging Skeleton mobs in Auchenai Crypts.

Formula: Enchant Chest - Exceptional Stats Phase 1 Item Level 69 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (345) Requires Honor Hold - Revered Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant chest armor to increase all stats by 6. Permanently enchant a piece of chest armor to add 6 to all stats. Requires a level 35 or higher item. Sell Price: 1 50 Formula: Enchant Chest - Exceptional Stats can be used by Enchanters to learn Exceptional Stats at 345 Enchanting skill. This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession.

Formula: Enchant Chest - Exceptional Stats Phase 1 Item Level 69 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (345) Requires Honor Hold - Revered Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant chest armor to increase all stats by 6. Formula: Enchant Cloak - Major Resistance Phase 1 Item Level 66 Requires Enchanting (330) Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant a cloak to increase all resistances by 7. Permanently enchant a cloak to increase all Resistances by 7. Requires a level 35 or higher item. Sell Price: 1 50 This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is looted from Spectral Stable Hand. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item.

Sell Price: 2 Formula: Enchant Weapon - Major Spellpower can be used by Enchanters to learn Major Spellpower at 350 Enchanting skill. This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession.

Formula: Enchant 2H Weapon - Major Agility Phase 1 Item Level 72 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (360) Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant a two-handed weapon to increase Agility by 35. Permanently enchant a Two Handed Melee Weapon to add 35 Agility. Requires a level 35 or higher item. Sell Price: 1 50 This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is looted from Eredar Deathbringer. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item.

Formula: Enchant Weapon - Mongoose Phase 1 Item Level 75 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (375) Use: Learn how to permanently enchant a Melee Weapon to occasionally increase Agility by 120 and attack speed slightly. Permanently enchant a Melee Weapon to occasionally increase Agility by 120 and attack speed slightly. Requires a level 35 or higher item. Sell Price: 1 50 Formula: Enchant Weapon - Mongoose can be used by Enchanters to learn Mongoose at 375 Enchanting skill. This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession.

Sell Price: 1 50 Formula: Enchant Weapon - Sunfire can be used by Enchanters to learn Sunfire at 375 Enchanting skill. This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession.

Sell Price: 1 50 This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is looted from Terestian Illhoof. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item.

Greater Inscription of Discipline Item Level 70 Binds when picked up Requires Level 70 Requires The Aldor - Exalted Use: Permanently adds up to 18 spell damage and healing and 10 spell critical strike rating to a shoulder slot item. Does not stack with other enchantments for the selected equipment slot. It is sold by Inscriber Saalyn. In the Item Enhancements (Permanent) category. Added in World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade. Always up to date.

Greater Inscription of Faith Item Level 70 Binds when picked up Requires Level 70 Requires The Aldor - Exalted Use: Permanently adds up to 33 healing and 11 spell damage and 4 mana per 5 sec. to a shoulder slot item. Does not stack with other enchantments for the selected equipment slot. It is sold by Inscriber Saalyn. In the Item Enhancements (Permanent) category. Added in World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade. Always up to date.
